text: I am immersed in a space devoted to exploration and the pursuit of innovation—'R+D' stands tall on the wall before me, signaling research and development as the lifeblood of this place. The screens pulse with information, ideas, and possibilities, inviting reflection on the interplay of discovery and humanity. Being here, I feel curious and contemplative, energized by the prospect that our quest for understanding is an ongoing journey. The solitude of the room magnifies my sense of focus and wonder.
